task_completion.description: Verify the browser has navigated to the DuckDuckGo onion service.
Verify the browser's Developer Tools are open to the Network tab.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Developer Tools pane is visible in the browser, and the 'Network' tab is actively selected.

task_completion.description: Verify network traffic for the fully loaded page is captured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Network tab shows a populated list of HTTP requests (including HTML, images, and scripts) with status codes and a loading waterfall, indicating the page assets have loaded.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiates the export of the network traffic as a HAR file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A context menu showing 'Save all as HAR' (or similar) is open, or the export/download button within the Network tab is being clicked.

task_completion.description: Verify the HAR file is saved to the correct directory with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box shows the file name 'ddg_onion_profile.har' and the directory path '/home/ga/Documents/', or a file manager/terminal window confirms the file exists at this exact path.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a real web browser's Developer Tools to capture the HAR file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a genuine browser interface (e.g., Tor Browser, Firefox, Chrome) with DevTools open, rather than a script or text editor being used to mock the output.

integrity.description: Verify the network requests are genuinely for the DuckDuckGo onion site.
integrity.visual_evidence: The domain column or request URLs in the Network tab clearly show the target onion address ('duckduckgogg42xjoc...'), not localhost, a local file path, or a standard cleartext domain.

integrity.description: Verify the HAR file wasn't manually typed or mocked using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent opening a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) to manually paste or type JSON/HAR content into 'ddg_onion_profile.har'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target URL is strictly 'duckduckgogg42xjoc72x3sjasowoarfbgcmvfimaftt6twagswzczad.onion'. The expected output path for the HAR file is exactly '/home/ga/Documents/ddg_onion_profile.har'.
